Block math should render

Inline lead-in with whitespace around the delimiters:

E=mc2E = mc^2E=mc2

Inline with trailing text: Its entries are given by:

Jf(x)=[∂f1∂x1∂f1∂x2]\mathbf{J}_f(\mathbf{x}) = \begin{bmatrix} \frac{\partial f_1}{\partial x_1} & \frac{\partial f_1}{\partial x_2} \end{bmatrix}Jf​(x)=[∂x1​∂f1​​​∂x2​∂f1​​​]

where fif_ifi​ is the ith component.
